label: Ideo weapon class pair
description: Specifies the noble and despised weapon classes for an ideology or culture. Pawns have mood bonuses for carrying noble weapons and penalties for despised ones.

noble.label: Noble
noble.description: WeaponClassDef preferred by this ideology or culture. Pawns get a mood bonus for using this weapon class.

despised.label: Despised
despised.description: WeaponClassDef disfavored by this ideology or culture. Pawns get a mood penalty for using this weapon class.
